raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 708 establishes a special permit for Californians to operate certain off-road motorcycles at sanctioned events.",
    "The new sanctioned event permit program created by SB 708 will replace the Red Sticker registration program that ended in 2021.",
    "SB 708 provides a cost-effective, bureaucratically streamlined identification decal to be displayed on competition motorcycles at sanctioned events on public lands.",
    "Competition OHVs have been regulated under the Red Sticker program by the California Air Resources Board (CARB) for the past two decades.",
    "The Red Sticker program ended in 2021 with no program to replace it, leading to confusion for OHV competitions on public lands.",
    "The uncertainty caused by the lack of a new program negatively impacts local businesses, jobs, and the economy of rural and suburban regions.",
    "Funding for environmental work and law enforcement related to OHV competitions has been lost due to the end of the Red Sticker program."
  ]
}
```
